channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senegal's promising tale of fish, rice, and dangerous worms
item.description: Farmers in Senegal introduce fish to rice paddies, hoping they fertilize crops, provide food, and eat snails.

item.title: Cyclosporiasis outbreak spreads across more than half of U.S. states
item.description: Federal health authorities report a surge of intestinal illness cases causing diarrhea and nausea in 31 states.

item.title: Ethical concerns raised over AI-generated political text messages
item.description: Bots trained to mimic candidates are sending personalized texts, making AI conversations a new campaign tool.

item.title: A Bible passage is at the center of a debate over how the U.S. should treat immigrants
item.description: A debate over the Bible verse Matthew 25 is pitting mainline pastors, Black protestants and the pope against evangelical politicians put on the defens...
